case_title: GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC. VS. MARIO PEREZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-21-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED/OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC. IS PRESENT; REPRESENTED BY BOBBY LEW, CEO. DEFENDANT MARIO PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BOBBY LEW, CEO. DEFENDANT MARIO PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC.
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARIO DBA AUTO MARIO AS TO PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: BOBBY LEW, CEO APPEARING FOR GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,705.82 FILED BY GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARIO DBA AUTO MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FILING FEE: $125.00) SERVED JUL-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARIO DBA AUTO MARIO
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: BOBBY LEW, CEO TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC.
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARIO DBA AUTO MARIO AS TO PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN AUTO GARAGE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, MARIO DBA AUTO MARIO $4,705.82 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,880.82, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO TREBLE DAMAGES AS PLAINTIFF PROVED BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT THERE WAS NO GOOD FAITH DISPUTE THAT CAUSED DEFENDANT TO STOP PAYMENT ON THE CHECK AT ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
